mapper.select: select paper_id, total_submit_count, pass_rate, score_distribution_json, trend_json, hourly_heat_json, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from practice_paper_analysis where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = false
mapper.update: update practice_paper_analysis set total_submit_count = #{totalSubmitCount}, pass_rate = #{passRate}, score_distribution_json = #{scoreDistributionJson}, trend_json = #{trendJson}, hourly_heat_json = #{hourlyHeatJson}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where paper_id = #{paperId}
